observations: FreeStorageSpace dropped from 18 GiB to 2.1 GiB over 40 minutes while WriteLatency and DiskQueueDepth climbed.
The instance remained available but write operations slowed sharply as storage approached zero.

metrics.summary: FreeStorageSpace reached 2.1 GiB and was still decreasing at the time of the alert.
WriteLatency increased above 2.8 seconds as the volume filled.
